description: Moving or capable of moving at high speed; happening in a short time. 'Reshi' names the quality of speed—rapid movement, quick occurrence.
sound_symbolism: The word moves swiftly. 'Re' releases with quick energy, motion initiated. Then 'shi' /ʃi/ rushes past, speed achieved.
grammatical_notes: Functions as an adjective: 'reshi luphore' (fast river). Opposite of 'sheru' (slow). Phi philosophy generally favors slowness, but speed has its place in appropriate contexts.

pillars.solarpunk-values: Fast adaptation enables resilience—communities that respond quickly to change can survive disruption.
pillars.pre-industrial-wisdom: Pre-industrial life needed speed in its place: quick action when the river rose, swift help for the hurt. 'Reshi' names that kind of fast.
